src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Replace hardcoded URL path strings with constants from a configuration class to centralize API endpoint definitions.
Rename the service field from 'service' to 'productService' to improve code readability and explicitness.
Remove conditional logic for category filtering from the controller, delegating it entirely to the service layer.
Add a new endpoint to retrieve product history by ID.
Add @Valid annotation to request body parameters to enable automatic bean validation.
Rename the update method parameter from 'product' to 'updatedProduct' to distinguish it from the entity type.
Change delete endpoint return type to ResponseEntity<Void> with 204 No Content status for better REST compliance.
Replace manual getter, setter, and constructor implementations with Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code.
Add Jakarta Bean Validation annotations to enforce data integrity rules on entity fields.
Change the class hierarchy to extend a TenantEntity base class, likely to support multi-tenancy features.
Introduce new fields to the model to support event tracking and original product references.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: private Long originalProductId; private String eventType; private LocalDateTime eventTime;

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Add a specific constructor to initialize the product with name, price, and current event time.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: public Product(String name, Double price) { ... this.eventTime = LocalDateTime.now(); }

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Added a derived query method to find products by original product ID and tenant ID, ordered by event time.
Added a custom JPQL query to find current products for a tenant, filtering out non-CREATED events.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: @Query("SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.tenantId = :tenantId AND (p.eventType IS NULL OR p.eventType = 'CREATED')") List<Product> findCurrentProductsByTenant(@Param("tenantId") String tenantId);

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Added a custom JPQL query to find a product by ID and tenant ID, returning an Optional.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: @Query("SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.id = :id AND p.tenantId = :tenantId") Optional<Product> findByIdAndTenantId(@Param("id") Long id, @Param("tenantId") String tenantId);

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Added a custom JPQL query to find all products for a specific tenant ID.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: @Query("SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.tenantId = :tenantId") List<Product> findAllByTenantId(@Param("tenantId") String tenantId);

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Removed the simple derived query method for finding products by category.
Added import for Spring Data JPA Query annotation.
Added import for Spring Data repository Param annotation.
Added import for Java Optional class.
Inject ProductProducer to enable Kafka message publishing for product events.
Inject TenantProvider to support multi-tenancy context retrieval.
Use AppConstants for standardized event types and logging messages.
Use HistoryBuilder to create historical records for product changes.
Use ProductNotFoundException for explicit error handling when products are missing.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: throw new ProductNotFoundException("Product with id " + id + " not found");

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Add @Transactional to ensure database operations are wrapped in a transaction.
Add SLF4J logger for tracking service operations and errors.
Update getAllProducts to filter by tenant ID instead of returning all products.
Update getProductById to filter by tenant ID and throw exception if not found.
Add getProductHistory to retrieve historical changes for a product.
Update createProduct to set event metadata and publish to Kafka.
Update updateProduct to create history record, filter by tenant, and publish to Kafka.
Update deleteProduct to create history record, filter by tenant, and publish to Kafka.
Add processProductEvent to handle incoming product events based on type.
Add handleProductEventFromKafka to process Kafka events with history tracking.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: public void handleProductEventFromKafka(Product productEvent, boolean processEvent) { ... }

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Remove getProductsByCategory as it is replaced by tenant-aware queries.
Use Java 17+ switch expression for event type handling.

src/test/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Moved the test class from the controller package to the root service package to align with new project structure.
Added EmbeddedKafka and MockBean for ProductProducer to support integration testing of Kafka interactions.
Activated the 'test' profile to ensure correct configuration loading during integration tests.
Added a BeforeEach method to clear the database before each test to ensure isolation.
Updated the test to use the new API path '/api/products' instead of '/products'.
Added the X-Tenant-Id header to requests to support multi-tenancy requirements.
Replaced escaped JSON string with Java 15+ text blocks for better readability.
Changed the test product data from generic 'TestProduct' to specific 'Apple' to match new test scenarios.
Removed specific JSON path assertions for the create endpoint, relying only on status code.
Migrate test initialization from manual Mockito mocking to annotation-based injection for cleaner code.
src/test/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: Replaced `Mockito.mock()` and manual constructor injection with `@Mock`, `@InjectMocks`, and `MockitoAnnotations.openMocks(this)`.

src/test/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Initialize tenant context in test setup to support multi-tenancy logic in service methods.
Update test assertions to verify tenant-specific repository calls instead of generic ones.
Add mocking for Kafka producer to verify event publishing in service tests.
src/test/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: Added `@Mock ProductProducer` and verified `sendMessage` calls in create/delete tests.

src/test/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Update tests to expect exceptions when products are not found, aligning with new service behavior.
src/test/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: Replaced `assertNull` checks with `assertThrows(ProductNotFoundException.class)` for missing products.

src/test/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Add new test cases for updated service methods like getById, delete, and update.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK environment.
Explicitly define maven compiler source and target properties to ensure consistent compilation settings.
Extract Lombok version into a dedicated property for easier management and consistency.
Explicitly declare the Maven Central repository in the POM.
Add H2 in-memory database dependency for testing purposes.
Add Spring Kafka test dependency to support unit/integration testing of Kafka components.
Add Spring Boot starter validation dependency for bean validation support.
Change Lombok scope from optional to provided and pin its version to the defined property.
Add MapStruct dependency for object mapping capabilities.
Add Flyway core dependency for database migration management.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin with explicit release version and annotation processor paths for Lombok and MapStruct.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from Eclipse Temurin 17 to Eclipse Temurin 21 to align with the target JDK version.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Changed Hibernate DDL auto mode from update to validate to enforce schema consistency with migration scripts.
Enabled Flyway database migration tool to manage schema changes explicitly.
Configured Flyway to look for migration scripts in the classpath db/migration directory.
Configured Flyway to baseline existing database schema on first migration run.
